title: Content Expansion & Timer
summary: Review says the game needs more content for replayability. This day adds 5 new levels (Chapter 3: Multi-Output) featuring 3-input puzzles and dual-output circuits. Also adds a completion timer with best-time tracking for each level, creating a speedrun incentive. Sound improvements: richer tones with harmonics for a more electronic feel.

tasks.description: Add Chapter 3: Multi-Output with 5 new levels (11-15). Level 11: Half Adder (SUM + CARRY from 2 inputs). Level 12: 3-input AND. Level 13: 2-of-3 Majority. Level 14: Multiplexer (select A or B using S). Level 15: Full Adder (3 inputs, 2 outputs).
acceptance_criteria: 5 new levels with correct truth tables
Multi-output levels work correctly with simulation

tasks.description: Add level completion timer — starts when level loads, stops on success, shows elapsed time, saves best time to progress.
acceptance_criteria: Timer starts when gameplay screen appears
Timer displays in mm:ss format in status bar
Best time saved in localStorage progress
Best time shown on level select cards for completed levels

tasks.description: Improve audio sounds — add harmonics to make tones feel more electronic/circuit-like. Richer click, buzzier zap, warmer success jingle.
acceptance_criteria: Click sound has harmonic overtone (sounds like a relay click)
Wire connect has more crackle/buzz (electronic zap)
Overall audio feels more thematic to circuits/electronics

testing_focus: All 5 new levels are playable and solvable
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
